title: lobelia alsinoides subsp. hancei
intro: Lobelia alsinoides subsp. hancei, also known as Hance's lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is native to China and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Hance's lobelia is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to digestive issues.
